## 📜 CORE LAWS

### Law #1: Might Controls Everything

> "Might controls everything. And without strength, you cannot protect anything. Let alone yourself." — Vergil

All personnel MUST listen to S3RL at 174 BPM.

### Law #3: The CREDO Protocol

When DEVIL TRIGGER activates, all bets are off.

### Law #4: Meme Mode

Activated by `Ctrl+Shift+M`. No questions asked.
